Description: The S2B-PH-K-S is a 2-position shrouded header from the JST PH series. It features a 2.0mm pitch and is designed for wire-to-board connections. This through-hole, top-entry connector provides a secure mechanical connection with a friction-locking mechanism to prevent accidental disconnection. It is widely used for battery connections and internal power/signal routing in compact electronic devices.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Typically connected to VCC or positive signal
Typically connected to Ground or return signal
